name: Valley National Bancorp 8.250% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C
summary: Valley National Bancorp 8.250% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C represents a series of preferred stock issued by Valley National Bancorp. These preferred shares offer a fixed dividend rate that may reset periodically and have a preference over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution during liquidation. Valley National Bancorp is a regional bank holding company.
